---
title: |
  Transformer \
  Models
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1200
    scrollable: true
    include-in-header: "math.html"
    footer: m408.inqs.info/lectures/14a
    theme: [default, styles.scss]
    preview-links: true
    navigation-mode: vertical
    controls-layout: edges
    controls-tutorial: true
    slide-number: true
    pointer:
      pointerSize: 48
    incremental: false 
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      chalk-width: 4
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    echo: true
    eval: false
    message: false
    warnings: false
    comment: "#>" 
    
revealjs-plugins:
  - pointer
  
filters: 
  - reveal-auto-agenda

editor: source
---



## SRT

Go onine and complete the Student Ratings of Teaching.

## Work on Projects

## StatQuest

[Encoder-Decoder Transformers](https://youtu.be/zxQyTK8quyY?si=2UUpkuYSD1brmwVE)

[Decoder-Only Transformers](https://youtu.be/bQ5BoolX9Ag?si=hbcNT_xsFeQQof-9)

[Encoder-Only Transformers](https://youtu.be/GDN649X_acE?si=xQemj_QkToGk0IDX)

## 3Blue1Brown

[Transformers](https://youtu.be/wjZofJX0v4M?si=rSJntNT_TZtJ7Ru2)

[Attention in Transformers](https://youtu.be/eMlx5fFNoYc?si=zWpn2cWxVlWpMHLe)

[Memory in LLMs](https://youtu.be/9-Jl0dxWQs8?si=OXNsgtxUFiySD7dF)
